Bash(cd "/c/Users/manth/open source/PathGlot" && python3 -c "
import urllib.request, json

API_KEY = ''

cities = [
    \('Madrid',        40.4200,  -3.7027\),
    \('Barcelona',     41.3917,   2.1649\),
    \('Buenos Aires', -34.6083, -58.3712\),
    \('Paris',         48.8698,   2.3082\),
    \('Montmartre',    48.8843,   2.3369\),
    \('Montreal',      45.5080, -73.5690\),
    \('Berlin',        52.5163,  13.3777\),
    \('Vienna',        48.2036,  16.3695\),
    \('Tokyo',         35.6596, 139.7006\),
    \('Osaka',         34.6789, 135.5054\),
    \('Rome',          41.8895,  12.4968\),
    \('Florence',      43.7678,  11.2584\),
    \('Lisbon',        38.7165,  -9.1427\),
    \('Sao Paulo',    -23.5613, -46.6565\),
]

for name, lat, lng in cities:
    url = f'https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/streetview/metadata?location={lat},{lng}&radius=50&key={API_KEY}'
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen\(url, timeout=5\) as r:
            data = json.loads\(r.read\(\)\)
            status = data.get\('status', 'UNKNOWN'\)
            pano_id = data.get\('pano_id', ''\)[:12] if data.get\('pano_id'\) else ''
            loc = data.get\('location', {}\)
            print\(f'{status:15} {name:15} pano={pano_id}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'ERROR          {name:15} {e}'\)
" 2>&1)
